name: smarter-agents
description: Research-backed system prompt skills that reduce token cost and improve output quality for AI coding assistants.

plugins.name: smarter-agents
plugins.description: All 9 skills: positive, context-trim, toolsmith, forge, contract, checkpoint, contrarian, anchor-point, grounding. Tier 1 runs once (zero cost), Tier 2 is always-on (~935 tokens), Tier 3 is opt-in.
